title: Enchantsmith
description: This mod adds the enchantsmith from the mc dungeons game
body:
With this mod, players can visit the Enchantsmith to exchange their existing enchantments for new ones and find an Enchantsmith Camp in the world.

In order to exchange enchants the player needs gold, emeralds and experience
Enchantments can be blacklisted and there is a config for gold, emerald and experience options

For suggestions, bug reports and general chat about the mod, join the discord server
